data.title: New high-resolution estimates of the permafrost thermal state and hydrothermal conditions for the Northern Hemisphere
data.abstract: We present a high-resolution permafrost dataset for the Northern Hemisphere from 2000 to 2016, including mean annual ground temperature, active layer thickness, and permafrost probability at 1 km resolution.

data.title: A Comprehensive Database of Thawing Permafrost Locations Across Alaska
data.abstract: We present a database of 19,540 permafrost thaw and thermokarst locations across Alaska, compiled from 44 sources spanning ~70 years.

data.title: Stub paper without DOI
data.abstract: A short abstract used to test handling of papers without DOIs.
